sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113008" key="xalinagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰλῑνᾰγωγ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guiding as with bit and bridle,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Νέμεσις</foreign> Vett.
